purpose: Run hostile review on T454 before any stronger Direction-A posture movement.

survival_checks.question: Does T454 actually match R-supported data while splitting only under the boundary menu?
evidence: T454 main pair has equal R visible projection.
T454 main pair has equal observational and R-interventional signatures.
R-only capability does not split; boundary menu splits can_revise_final_verdict.
survival_checks.residual_risk: This is correctness of the finite packet, not evidence that the boundary resource is physically non-declared.

survival_checks.question: Is the T447-style exact no-go tied to the same completion that would repair the deficient side?
evidence: T454 main packet names exact charge completion through a finite non-wrapping catalyst.
T454 imports the T447 nilpotent-shift certificate for that completion.
T452 exact-witness and completion-nonadmissibility checks pass for the main packet.
survival_checks.residual_risk: The witness is tied to a declared finite non-wrapping exact-catalyst policy only; it does not cover cyclic, consumed, or ideal references.

survival_checks.question: Do T454 controls reject nearby overreads?
evidence: Cyclic, consumed, ideal, and description-only completions are not admitted as the main result.
Post-hoc, hidden-label, missing-region, missing-control, and no-split packets are rejected.
Only the main integrated packet is admitted as a review target.
survival_checks.residual_risk: The controls narrow T454; they also expose why the result cannot be read as a stable Direction-A success.

hostile_objections.question: Does admitting the boundary-charge description still explain the capability split?
evidence: T454 description-factorization check reports no violations.
Capability factors through the boundary-charge description once that descriptor is admitted.
T454 itself records this as the honest ceiling below discriminator success.
hostile_objections.residual_risk: The packet remains below region-indexed discriminator success because a lawful description still says which side has the boundary resource.

hostile_objections.question: Does the positive packet depend on the declared finite non-wrapping exact-catalyst policy?
evidence: Cyclic reference control restores completion.
Consumed battery control routes to resource completion.
Ideal reference control routes away from the finite exact packet.
hostile_objections.residual_risk: The T447 witness remains policy-relative. A stronger packet must preclude, not merely exclude, these reference policies.

hostile_objections.question: Does T454 prove a new coupling theorem beyond the region packet plus the T447 no-go?
evidence: T454 combines a correct finite region packet with the T447 finite non-wrapping certificate.
T454 records region_discriminator_success as false.
No minimality, uniqueness, or policy-independent coupling theorem is claimed or supplied.
hostile_objections.residual_risk: This is acceptable for a review target, but it blocks a stronger Direction-A posture move.

hostile_objections.question: Does T455 authorize claim, roadmap, public, or cross-repo movement?
evidence: T454 is recorded-tier only.
The hostile objections above still fire.
Repo governance forbids changing public posture or cross-repo truth here.
hostile_objections.residual_risk: Any future promotion requires a new artifact that clears the description-completion and reference-policy objections.

overall_verdict.reading: T454 survives hostile review only at the level it claimed: a finite integrated review target. Its region equality, boundary split, exact-witness integration, and negative controls check out. Promotion remains blocked because law-sector description still explains the boundary resource, cyclic/consumed/ideal reference policies route away, and no new policy-independent region theorem is supplied.

recommended_next: Keep T454 as a recorded-tier review target, not a Direction-A success.
Do not move claim ledger, TESTS, roadmap, North Star, public posture, or cross-repo truth from T454/T455.
A stronger packet must make the boundary resource less descriptive and handle cyclic, consumed, and ideal reference policies.
If no such packet can be typed, demote the integrated E3-region route to a useful negative/guardrail lane.
honest_ceiling: Hostile-review gate only. T455 preserves T454 as a finite integrated review target while blocking any stronger Direction-A posture movement. It does not prove a region-indexed discriminator, real substrate law, quantum physics theorem, WAY theorem, GU/TaF adapter, claim support, or public posture.
